name: Cursed House 4
short_description: A very unusual Match 3 Puzzle game with some unique features!
detailed_description:
Cursed House 4 is the first game that can be called a Match 3 Puzzle. It's important not just to mindlessly create combinations, but to think about the sequence in which to do everything. This game features a new bonus system, levels where you can get stuck if not played correctly, and special challenge levels that players can choose to play and replay. These levels require some thought!

The game includes:

100 Match 3 levels needed to rid the house of ghosts
50 optional challenge Match 3 levels of special difficulty
9 Spot the difference scenes
A mansion ruined by ghosts that needs to be restored and cleansed of evil spirits
